allow: PowerShell($url = "https://api.github.com/repos/jackwener/OpenCLI/releases/tags/v1.7.22"; $release = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -Headers @{"User-Agent"="PowerShell"}; Write-Output "Name: $\($release.name\)"; Write-Output "Tag: $\($release.tag_name\)"; Write-Output "Assets:"; $release.assets | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.name\) \($\([Math]::Round\($_.size/1MB, 1\)\) MB\) - $\($_.browser_download_url\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\pnr" -File | ForEach-Object { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($_.FullName\); if \($bytes -contains 0\) { Write-Output "$\($_.Name\) contains null bytes" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin" -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.Name; for \($i=0; $i -lt $name.Length; $i++\) { if \([int]$name[$i] -eq 0\) { Write-Output "NULL CHAR in filename: $\($_.FullName\)"; break } } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin" -File | ForEach-Object { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($_.FullName\); for \($i=0; $i -lt [Math]::Min\(200, $bytes.Length\); $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0\) { Write-Output "NULL byte at offset $i in: $\($_.Name\)"; break } } })

PowerShell($path = "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($path\); $nullPositions = @\(\); for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0\) { $nullPositions += $i } }; if \($nullPositions.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "NULL bytes found at positions: $nullPositions" } else { Write-Output "Path is clean, no null bytes" }; Write-Output "Path: $path"; Write-Output "Path length: $\($path.Length\)")

PowerShell($impl = "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl"; if \(Test-Path $impl\) { Write-Output "impl dir exists"; Get-ChildItem $impl -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\)" } } else { Write-Output "impl dir MISSING"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $impl -Force; Write-Output "Created impl dir" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\temp\\rtl_parser.result"\) { $content = Get-Content "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\temp\\rtl_parser.result" -Raw; if \($content -match "FPGA resource"\) { Write-Output "OLD PATH FOUND in rtl_parser.result!"; Write-Output $content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $content.Length\)\) } else { Write-Output "rtl_parser.result paths look correct" } } else { Write-Output "rtl_parser.result does not exist \(synthesis may not have run yet\)" })

PowerShell($log = Get-Content "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\gwsynthesis\\GoWin.log"; Write-Output "Total lines: $\($log.Count\)"; Write-Output "=== Last 5 lines ==="; $log[-5..-1]; Write-Output "=== Lines with ERROR ==="; $log | Where-Object { $_ -match "ERROR" })

PowerShell($files = @\("D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\gwsynthesis\\GoWin.vg", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\gwsynthesis\\GoWin.prj"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { if \(Test-Path $f\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); $nulls = @\(\); for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0\) { $nulls += $i } }; if \($nulls.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "$\(Split-Path $f -Leaf\): NULL bytes at $nulls \(count=$\($nulls.Count\)\)" } else { Write-Output "$\(Split-Path $f -Leaf\): clean" } } })

PowerShell($appData = [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('ApplicationData'\); $gowinDirs = @\( "$appData\\Gowin", "$appData\\GowinSemiconductor", "$appData\\..\\Local\\Gowin", "$appData\\..\\Local\\GowinSemiconductor" \); foreach \($d in $gowinDirs\) { if \(Test-Path $d\) { Write-Output "Found: $d"; Get-ChildItem $d -Recurse -Depth 1 | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.FullName\)" } } })

PowerShell($impl = "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl"; if \(Test-Path $impl\) { $acl = Get-Acl $impl; Write-Output "Owner: $\($acl.Owner\)"; $acl.Access | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.IdentityReference\): $\($_.FileSystemRights\)" } } else { Write-Output "impl dir does not exist" })

PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin" -Recurse -File; $bad = @\(\); foreach \($f in $files\) { try { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f.FullName\); for \($i=0; $i -lt [Math]::Min\($bytes.Length, 500\); $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0\) { $bad += "$\($f.Name\) \(null at offset $i\)"; break } } } catch {} }; if \($bad.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "Files with null bytes:"; $bad | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $_" } } else { Write-Output "No null bytes found in any source file" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'MAST_CTR' } | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell($dirs = @\("D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\incremental_db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\src\\db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\src\\incremental_db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { if \(Test-Path $d\) { Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Deleted: $d" } })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl"\) { Write-Output "impl dir exists"; Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl" -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Name\)" } } else { Write-Output "impl dir MISSING" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $full = $_.FullName; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($full\); $hex = \($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\) -join ' '; Write-Output "Name: [$\($_.Name\)]"; Write-Output "  Full: $full"; Write-Output "  Hex:  $hex" })

PowerShell($vgPath = "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\master_control\\MST_TEST_450kV_V3_uncharge\\GoWin\\impl\\gwsynthesis\\GoWin.vg"; if \(Test-Path $vgPath\) { $content = Get-Content $vgPath -Raw; if \($content -match 'module\\s+\(\\w+\)'\) { Write-Output "Top module: $\($Matches[1]\)" }; $ports = [regex]::Matches\($content, '\\.\(\\w+\)\\\(\(\\w+\)\\\)'\); $portNames = $ports | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Select-Object -First 30 -Unique; Write-Output "First 30 ports:"; $portNames } else { Write-Output "GoWin.vg not found at $vgPath" })

PowerShell($dirs = @\("D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\src\\db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\src\\incremental_db", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\src\\output_files", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\src\\simulation", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\impl\\gwsynthesis", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\impl\\pnr", "D:\\CCwork\\test1\\FPGA\\slave_ control\\slave_ctrl_V1.80\(using\)\\impl\\temp"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { if \(Test-Path $d\) { Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Deleted: $\(Split-Path $d -Leaf\)" } })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); git status 2>&1; echo "---REMOTE---"; git remote -v 2>&1; echo "---BRANCH---"; git branch 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); cd D:\\CCwork\\test1; git status --short | Select-Object -First 5; echo "---TOTAL_FILES---"; \(git status --short | Measure-Object\).Count; echo "---CHECK_IMPL---"; git status --short | Select-String "impl")
